item.name: Create a client for a linked rental operator account

request.name: Create a client for a linked rental operator account

description.content: Creates a client and returns its id. This id can then be sent as optional `clientId` in `POST /api/partner/v1/deposits`. This endpoint is idempotent by email within account: when a client already exists, it returns 200 with the existing id.
Optional UUID v4 for request deduplication (24h). Same key + same body replays the cached response; same key + different body returns 409 `idempotency_key_conflict`.

item.name: Create a deposit for a linked rental operator

request.name: Create a deposit for a linked rental operator

description.content:
Creates a deposit on behalf of a linked rental operator (`accountId` in body). Optionally set `clientId` to attach an existing client from the same rental operator account.

**URL generation:** set `depositUrlGeneration: true` and `returnUrl` to receive `depositUrl` and send the tenant straight to Gando.

**Idempotency-Key:** optional UUID v4 header; replays return the same **201** and `data.id` within 24h when the body is unchanged.
Optional UUID v4 for request deduplication (24h). Same key + same body replays the cached response; same key + different body returns 409 `idempotency_key_conflict`.
Optional UUID v4 for request deduplication (24h). Same key + same body replays the cached response; same key + different body returns 409 `idempotency_key_conflict`.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Lists deposits across **all active** rental operator accounts linked to your partner.

Pass **`accountId`** query to return only deposits for that single linked rental operator account.

Repeat query parameter **`status`** to filter by several statuses (e.g. `?status=pending&status=active`).

When `includeCounts=true` **and** `accountId` is set, the response includes per-status counts for that account.
When set, only deposits for this linked rental operator account (`accountId`)
Page number (1-based)
Items per page (max 100)
Field to sort deposit results by (This can only be one of amount,status,rentalContract,startAt,expiresAt,reference,createdAt)
Sort direction: ascending or descending (This can only be one of asc,desc)
Repeat `status` to filter by multiple deposit statuses
Repeat `status` to filter by multiple deposit statuses
Filter deposits assigned to this client id
Minimum deposit amount in euros (inclusive)
Maximum deposit amount in euros (inclusive)
Filter: contract/start date on or after (ISO 8601)
Filter: contract/start date on or before (ISO 8601)
Filter: expiry date on or after (ISO 8601)
Filter: expiry date on or before (ISO 8601)
When `true` or `1`, include per-status counts (requires `accountId`) (This can only be one of 0,1,true,false)

Sends a sample **`deposit.activated`** payload to the endpoint URL. The endpoint must be subscribed to either `deposit.activated` or the wildcard `deposit.status_changed`.

Sample payload sent by this test and the production dispatcher:

```json
{
  "event": "deposit.activated",
  "createdAt": "2026-03-02T10:00:00.000Z",
  "data": {
    "id": "dep_test_abc123",
    "reference": "GAN-TEST",
    "rentalContract": "CTR-TEST-2026",
    "status": "active",
    "previousStatus": "pending",
    "amountCents": 150000,
    "contractStartAt": null,
    "contractEndAt": null,
    "client": null,
    "partnerContext": {
      "partnerId": "ptr_xxx",
      "partnerName": "Fleetee",
      "externalId": "fleet_operator_42"
    }
  }
}
```
(Required) Partner webhook endpoint id
(Required) Partner webhook endpoint id

API for **rental management software** and **multi–rental-operator platforms** integrating Gando on behalf of linked rental operators. Use **`gando_pk_`** keys (`x-api-key` or `Authorization: Bearer`) on `/api/partner/v1/*`.
